title: CreateTokenOpts
description: Request object for creating a connect token

allowed_origins.description: List of allowed origins for CORS

error_redirect_uri.description: URI to redirect to on error

expires_in.description: Token TTL in seconds (max 14400 = 4 hours). Defaults to 4 hours if not specified.

external_user_id.description: Your end user ID, for whom you're creating the token

scope.description: Space-separated scopes to restrict token permissions. Defaults to 'connect:*' if not specified. See https://pipedream.com/docs/connect/api-reference/authentication#connect-token-scopes for more information.

success_redirect_uri.description: URI to redirect to on success

allow_progressive_scopes.description: When true, end users may authorize a subset of the app's OAuth scopes; only the app's functional scopes (needed for the post-OAuth test request) are enforced. Defaults to false.
